label: Meridian Sleepcell
description: Meridian Sleepcell is a wedge-shaped bedroom cut into the dark crystalline strata behind The Refraction Cask, its walls faced in ground prismglass set to strict meridian angles. A low platform bed of fused shardglass anchors the narrow end of the chamber, while a recessed niche holds folded linens and sealed drinking flasks in light-absorbing alcoves. Lattice-aligned louvers admit a thin, regulated ribbon of refracted color that falls as a fixed band across the floor, leaving the remainder in engineered shadow. Faceted acoustic baffles line the ceiling ribs, maintaining the tavern’s disciplined quiet within a space built for rest.
